_meta.purpose: Baseline ns/iter for the perf_smoke_benchmarks suite. Used by scripts/check-perf-smoke.mjs to detect major (>=3x) regressions. NOT an authoritative performance record. See docs/performance/perf-smoke.md.
_meta.seeded_from: Rough scaling of docs/performance/benchmarks.md numbers to allow for ubuntu-latest CI being slower and noisier than the reference Apple Silicon run. Replace with real CI-measured values on first green run.

perf_smoke/write_one_wal_group.note: Seed estimate from local Apple Silicon (~15 µs/iter) scaled ~2.5x for ubuntu-latest. Refresh after first green CI run.

perf_smoke/write_batch_100_wal_group.note: Seed estimate from local Apple Silicon (~1.56 ms/iter) scaled ~2.5x for ubuntu-latest. Wide threshold because WAL segment rotation and FS noise inflate variance. Refresh after first green CI run.

perf_smoke/tx_write_100_wal_group.note: Seed estimate from local Apple Silicon (~2.6 ms/iter) scaled ~2.5x for ubuntu-latest. Wide threshold because the explicit-tx path stages-and-publishes alongside the WAL append and adds variance. Refresh after first green CI run.
